commit.message:
[renovate] Mount bootstrap helper from runner host paths

Purpose: Restore Renovate workflow token minting after the live replay exposed missing bootstrap credentials in the job container
Scope: Update the Renovate workflow and workflow contract tests
Status: Local workflow and contract checks pass; live Gitea replay is next
Next: Push the private branch, rerun the workflows, and capture live receipts
See also: ADR 0297
